text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Considering the circumstances, your diligence
thus far has been greater than my estimations.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ohh! I'm diligent? And what specifically makes
you think so?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You've congratulated me on my birthday, helped
me with problems in class... Overall, you've
demonstrated a meticulous attention to detail.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your actions always looked careless before, but
now I will have to update my database.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! I'm the class rep, so it's only normal that
I keep an eye on everyone in our class!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But right now it's not me, the representative,
congratulating you. It's me, your friend!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, friendship detected. Thank you, Bakushin
O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh right, I got you cleats for your birthday
present, but I didn't know your size. Sorry if they
don't fit great!
